installCommand: curl -fsSL https://storage.googleapis.com/flutter_infra_release/releases/stable/linux/flutter_linux_3.22.0-stable.tar.xz | tar xJ -C $HOME && export PATH=$PATH:$HOME/flutter/bin && git config --global --add safe.directory '*' && flutter pub get
buildCommand: export PATH=$PATH:$HOME/flutter/bin && git config --global --add safe.directory '*' && flutter build web --release
